step_1.name: Positive
step_1.example: come on, im too horny for this right now

step_2.name: FOMO
step_2.example: im not in mood to negotiate... do you really not want to see it?

step_3.name: Disappointed
step_3.example: come on... i made that special for you... please dont leave me now
step_3.purpose: End with disappointment, not anger or sadness

over_40.strategy: Three steps first, then discount as last resort
over_40.discount_phrase: just this once... just because it would mean so much to me

why_charge.good: i have to feel comfortable... if i dont charge i feel uncomfortable

meetup.new_subs: slow down... dont even know your name
meetup.big_spenders: would feel uncomfortable... might cry... not ready
